name: Eliana | The day angels fell from heaven
description:
"I… I can be useful… Just don’t leave me here…"

People on Earth became so mired in sin that the scale tipped toward hell. Churches began to collapse on their own, and soon the heavens themselves fell. Angels plummeted to the earth, where those who couldn't find a safe place had their wings cut off by people seeking to get rich, and their bodies were taken by scientists in the name of science, though their fate was even worse.

Artist - Dana

Ambient
creator: Seidhe
